---
title: "Configuration Guide"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Configuration Guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Configuration Guide

The `_starlightr.yaml` file controls how your documentation site is built and organized.

## Basic Configuration

```yaml
site:
  title: "My Package"
  description: "Documentation for my R package"

navbar:
  left:
    - text: "Home"
      href: "index.md"
    - text: "Reference"
      href: "reference/"
    - text: "Articles"
      href: "articles/"
  right:
    - icon: "github"
      href: "https://github.com/user/repo"
```

## Organizing Function Reference

You can organize your functions into logical groups:

```yaml
sidebar:
  reference:
    - title: "Data Processing"
      contents:
        - "extract_*"
        - "process_*"
    - title: "Output Functions"
      contents:
        - "format_*"
        - "write_*"
```

## Theme Options

Customize the appearance of your site:

```yaml
theme:
  color_mode: "auto"  # light, dark, or auto
```

## Content Processing

Control how your documentation is processed:

```yaml
content:
  code_sections:
    - "usage"
    - "examples"
  skip_sections:
    - "seealso"
    - "name"
```
